.agentic/communication_artifacts.yaml.notes: Machine-readable communication artifact allowlist and retention policy.

.agentic/config.yaml.notes: Self-hosting workspace manifest that keeps physical legacy paths stable during P5a.

README.md.notes: Public entry point and command visibility anchor.

docs/DOCUMENTATION_COVERAGE.yaml.notes: Existing coverage matrix remains active and is not replaced by this registry.

docs/DOCUMENTATION_REGISTRY.yaml.notes: Self-registers the additive registry schema baseline.

docs/DOC_REGISTRY_SCOPE.yaml.notes: Declarative opt-in scope for making selected documentation registry areas strict.

docs/STATUS.md.notes: Concise current-state dashboard, not a long-term history file.

docs/TEST_GATES.md.notes: Defines required evidence for documentation registry and governance changes.

docs/WORKFLOW_OUTPUT_CYCLE.md.notes: Active workflow-output handoff and state behavior runbook.

docs/architecture/DOCUMENTATION_INFORMAT.notes: Documentation information architecture and lifecycle baseline.

docs/architecture/KIT_AS_OS_ARCHITECTURE.notes: Governing kit-as-operating-layer architecture authority for the workspace resolver and P1 migration line.

docs/architecture/P5C_PHYSICAL_MIGRATION.notes: P5c decision-ready physical migration plan; execution remains maintainer-gated and public docs paths may stay as projections.

docs/architecture/evidence/command-manif.notes: CM4 command-manifest audit evidence showing chat entrypoint manifest references are current and non-blocking.

docs/architecture/evidence/doc-lifecycle.notes: Post-L5 documentation lifecycle audit evidence in warn mode showing 45 visible non-blocking findings, zero blocking findings, and strict adoption left maintainer-gated.

docs/architecture/evidence/legacy-profil.notes: P5d implicit legacy profile deprecation evidence with suppressible warning behavior and admin-refresh YAML subject hardening.

docs/architecture/evidence/mutation-lock.notes: LC1 report-only mutation-lock coverage evidence with current audit classifications, gap inventory, and branch_create recheck.
LC3 mutation-lock remediation evidence showing zero blocking findings, same-PID reentrant runtime mutator coverage, non-blocking false-positive visibility, and standard-suite adoption.

docs/architecture/evidence/path-literal-.notes: P5b active-class path and repository identity literal enforcement evidence with standard-gate adoption and manual reference_or_message samples.
Post-P1 report-only path literal inventory showing the P1 top-3 modules migrated to zero and workspace.py as the central literal source.
Post-S6 report-only path literal inventory after transfer CLI modularization.
Post-S6 report-only path literal inventory used to derive the P1 migration order.
Machine-generated report-only path literal inventory for workspace migration planning.
Post-P4b report-only path literal inventory showing resolver-sweep classifications, declared exceptions, zero active path literals, and repo identity literals for follow-up visibility.

docs/architecture/evidence/remote-branch.notes: K3 remote branch hygiene evidence recording post-prune inventory, guarded wrapper deletions, protected open PR branches, and maintainer-decision leftovers.
